description: Transform the article draft at /home/ga/Documents/article_draft.odt into a professional magazine layout. The body text (following the author name) must be formatted into two columns with at least 0.2" spacing, while the title and author remain in a single column. Apply automatic hyphenation and justified alignment to all body paragraphs. Include a 3-line drop cap on the first paragraph of the body text. Create a centered pull quote with page wrapping containing the text: 'These tiny ecosystems can lower urban temperatures by up to 4 degrees.' Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/article_layout.odt.

metadata.pull_quote_text: These tiny ecosystems can lower urban temperatures by up to 4 degrees.
